svg.aria-label: axonmesh decides whether a camera frame should be sent to the cluster at all: 53 percent of frames are answered on the device and only detections cross the wire, 47 percent escalate as a JPEG frame to yolo11m. 5.43 KB per frame at mAP 0.440, against 11.16 KB at 0.448 when every frame is sent.
